title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CDAC

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CDAC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
